scripts.build: npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-client run build:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-mcp run build:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-provider-sui run build:self
scripts.test: npm run build && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-client run test:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-mcp run test:self && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-provider-sui run test:self
